fixtureDescription: Very short two-sentence passage — minimum viable input
passage: The cat sat on the mat. It was a sunny day, and the children played in the park.

items.levelRationale: Basic animal vocabulary taught in beginner courses.
items.importanceRationale: Essential for understanding the main subject of the passage.

items.levelRationale: Simple past tense of basic verb "sit" used in elementary instruction.
items.importanceRationale: Core verb form necessary for comprehension of the main action.

items.importanceRationale: Useful for context but not critical to overall passage meaning.

items.levelRationale: Basic adjective describing weather taught at beginner level.

items.importanceRationale: Important for understanding the temporal context.

items.levelRationale: Basic noun for young people taught at elementary level.

items.levelRationale: Common location vocabulary taught at beginner level.
items.importanceRationale: Important for understanding where the action took place.
